productDisplayName: Salomon Men Techamphibian 3 Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note This mountain shoe is equipped to handle the obstacles in water and land, has a sandal-meets-shoe styling on the upper. This shoe affords the comfort of a shoe with the lightness of a sandal - the Techamphibian 3 has an improved tongue construction and a soft fabric lining. If you're wondering what shoes to wear for your hiking trip where you have to wade through streams, this is the right shoe for you. They are extremely shock absorbent in the heel strike and offer superior grip on wet rock (as the name indicates!). These are also great for rock scrambling on dry land and boulder hopping in water. We're safe in summing up that these are great for just about any outdoor activity! Product Details Quick drying, breathable mesh upper which keeps waterborne debris from being sucked under your soles Quicklace system - pull on toggle straps to tighten the Fit (lace pocket on the tongue) Articulated collar and re-patterned tongue provide better fit Textile liner with neoprene and LYCRA for next-to-skin comfort. Midsoles are compression-moulded EVA with drainage ports Outsoles are non-marking Water Contagrip rubber. Low-profile lugged traction with a large contact area and sipes (small slits) for traction on wet surfaces. Material and Care Synthetic, fabric Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
